description_long: This is a full-sized umbrella with a dome-shaped canopy featuring colorful cartoon characters, including several with large eyes and expressive faces. The canopy is divided into multiple panels, each decorated with a different part of the illustrated scene, with a mix of cream, blue, pink, and purple backgrounds. The central shaft is black and straight, supporting the canopy and ending in a simple, straight handle. The tip of the umbrella is capped and rounded, matching the shaft in color. The umbrella appears to be constructed from lightweight metal or fiberglass for the shaft and ribs, with a synthetic fabric canopy. The overall design is playful and eye-catching, making it suitable for personal use in urban environments, especially for children or fans of animated characters.
description: A colorful, cartoon-themed umbrella with a dome-shaped canopy, black shaft, and straight handle. The canopy features multiple illustrated characters and vibrant panels.
description_view_0: The front view shows the cream-colored canopy with several cartoon characters prominently displayed, including a character with a square body and another with a blue face.
description_view_1: This side view highlights more cartoon characters on a darker background, with purple and pink hues dominating the visible panels.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the canopy's darker side, with abstract purple shapes and additional cartoon faces along the edge.
description_view_3: This view reveals a group of cartoon characters standing together on the cream background, with the black shaft and handle clearly visible below.
